ui.title: EE Operational Summary Widget
ui.desc: Offer a snapshot of SCF platform activity including active financing, invoice values, and pending onboarding requests.

data.sql: SELECT 'Active Financing' as "Metric", 4200000 as "Value" FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'Invoices Processed', 1250000 FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'Pending Approvals', 14 FROM DUAL
